liveMarketPrices.h2: What Are UK Drivers Paying for BMW M2 Engine Replacement?
liveMarketPrices.h3: The table below shows typical UK rebuilt engine costs across BMW M2 variants, covering documented failure causes, chassis generations, engine codes, and fuel types based on current market data.

introBullets.label: Live market context
introBullets.text: See realistic rebuilt-engine quote ranges across documented BMW M2 variants.

introBullets.label: Variant specific
introBullets.text: Each row highlights the exact variant, failure trigger, engine code and fuel type behind replacement demand.

introBullets.label: Specialist pricing
introBullets.text: These figures reflect the independent UK engine supplier and rebuilder market rather than main dealer replacement costs.

introBullets.label: Quote benchmark
introBullets.text: Use the feed to benchmark your own enquiry before comparing live quotes for your registration.

cta.heading: Benchmark your own BMW M2 quote
cta.text: Use these recent enquiry ranges to understand the market, then compare tailored quotes for your exact BMW M2 engine code.
cta.note: Prices vary by engine code, variant, damage severity, mileage, supplier stock and whether you need supply-only or supply and fit.
